summary: Comprehensive testing of Waypoint Studio GPX route maker focusing on new GPX import feature and insert-waypoint-between functionality. Backend: 19/19 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All major features working correctly including new GPX import button and route interaction features.
passed_tests: Route solving with cycling and running profiles
Route solving with exclude motorways (now working)
GPX import with valid file (new feature)
GPX import rejection of invalid files (new feature)
Route CRUD operations (save, list, get, delete)
Frontend app loading and all components visible
Import GPX button visible in sidebar (new feature)
Route calculation and display with elevation profile
Route stats updates (distance, duration, elevation gain/loss)
